AMZN.strategy: Oversold tech giant with AI monetization tailwinds. RSI <30 signals exhaustion selling—classic mean-reversion entry.
AMZN.catalyst: AWS AI services ramping + Prime price power + advertising flywheel accelerating. Trades at 15x cash flow vs 5-year avg 25x.
AMZN.risk: Consumer discretionary exposure if recession deepens. Regulatory overhang (FTC). Watch for break below $220 support.

NFLX.strategy: Extreme oversold bounce play. RSI 14.6 suggests panic selling—institutional capitulation often marks bottoms.
NFLX.catalyst: Ad-tier revenue inflection + paid sharing converting moochers + margin expansion to 25%+. Free cash flow $6B annually.
NFLX.risk: Subscriber growth plateau in saturated markets. Content spend inflation. Competition from YouTube/Disney+.

SNOW.strategy: High-growth data cloud at reasonable entry. Consolidating after 70% drawdown—valuation reset complete.
SNOW.catalyst: AI data pipeline demand exploding + $4B remaining performance obligations + new CEO driving efficiency.
SNOW.risk: Growth deceleration from 100%+ to 30% range. Consumption model vulnerable to enterprise budget cuts.

SOFI.strategy: Fintech turn-around with bank charter moat. Breaking even on GAAP—inflection to profitability underway.
SOFI.catalyst: Galileo platform revenue + student loan refinancing if rates cut + tech platform M&A interest.
SOFI.risk: Capital ratios need monitoring. Student loan moratorium hangover. Execution risk on tech platform pivot.

CDNS.strategy: Quality compounder pullback. Mission-critical EDA software with 90%+ renewal rates—recession-resistant.
CDNS.catalyst: AI chip design boom (every AI chip uses Cadence) + 3nm/2nm process node complexity + pricing power.
CDNS.risk: Semiconductor capex cyclicality. High valuation (35x P/E) leaves little margin for error.

LCID.strategy: Speculative EV recovery play. Saudi PIF backing provides floor—strategic value if technology acquired.
LCID.catalyst: Gravity SUV launch + Saudi production facility + potential strategic buyer (Apple, Saudi fund) at distressed levels.
LCID.risk: Cash burn critical—may need dilutive raise. Production hell continues. $5B+ cumulative losses. Only speculate small size.

NIO.strategy: Chinese EV turnaround with unique battery-swap moat. Trading near cash value—optionality on China stimulus.
NIO.catalyst: Battery swap network expansion + ET9 luxury sedan + potential state bailout if strategically important.
NIO.risk: China regulatory crackdowns. Cash runway limited. Geopolitical delisting risk. Highly speculative—size accordingly.

XPEV.strategy: Chinese EV with best-in-class autonomy. G6 SUV gaining traction—self-driving tech differentiation.
XPEV.catalyst: XNGP autonomous driving rollout + G6 international expansion + Volkswagen partnership validation.
XPEV.risk: China demand slowdown. Price war with BYD/Tesla. Heavy losses continue. Currency risk for US investors.

GM.strategy: Deep value with EV upside. 4x P/E with 10% FCF yield—market pricing in bankruptcy that won't happen.
GM.catalyst: Ultium EV platform scaling + Cruise robotaxi restart + dividend reinstatement potential + $16B cash cushion.
GM.risk: UAW strike overhang. EV transition capital intensity. ICE decline accelerating faster than EV grows.

ABNB.strategy: Travel recovery with platform moat. Unique supply (homes) creates pricing power vs hotels.
ABNB.catalyst: Experiences business scaling + international reopening + Gen Z travel preferences shifting to rentals.
ABNB.risk: Regulatory crackdown (NYC, Paris restrictions). Recession impacts discretionary travel. Host acquisition costs rising.
